commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `ApprovalsNamespace.respond` to accept/export `ApprovalDecisionParams` and send only `{ id, decision }` to `exec.approval.resolve`, with focused SDK unit coverage around stale caller fields.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +1. Total +10 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can forward caller-supplied extra fields to `exec.approval.resolve`, while the Gateway schema rejects additional properties. I did not run tests because this is a read-only review.
